steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between Uros House and The Mirror Connection. The notes show that both works are LED light sculptures made by Lucia Navarro, even though they differ in materials, shape, and size.

steps.title: Reject one-sided or contrast choices
steps.content: A discusses only Uros House. B emphasizes the huge size difference between the two works. D explicitly contrasts smooth domes with tangled tubes, which works against the requested similarity. The remaining choice uses both works to state their shared category and artist. The answer is C.
